CREATE TABLE system_paths (path_id INT, path VARCHAR(255));
SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id IN (SELECT path_id FROM system_paths WHERE path LIKE '/usr/%');
SELECT DISTINCT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id < (SELECT MAX(path_id) FROM system_paths);
SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id = (SELECT MIN(path_id) FROM system_paths) UNION SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id = (SELECT MAX(path_id) FROM system_paths);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_paths WHERE path IS NOT NULL;
SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id IN (SELECT path_id FROM system_paths WHERE path NOT LIKE '%bin%') ORDER BY path DESC;
SELECT p1.path FROM system_paths p1 JOIN system_paths p2 ON p1.path_id <> p2.path_id WHERE p1.path LIKE '/usr/%' AND p2.path LIKE '%/bin/';
SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE LENGTH(path) BETWEEN 10 AND 255;
DELETE FROM system_paths WHERE path_id = (SELECT path_id FROM system_paths WHERE path = '/sbin/');
SELECT path FROM system_paths WHERE path_id IN (SELECT path_id FROM system_paths ORDER BY path_id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0);
